Frequently Asked Questions
Q1. When did the IIT GATE Online Application Process Start?
The online application process started on 14 August 2026 .
Q2. What is the Exam Date of IIT GATE 2027?
GATE 2027 Exam Schedule on 06-21 February 2027 .
Q3. Where can I find the Syllabus for the IIT GATE Examination?
The detailed Subject Wise GATE 2027 Syllabus are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete details.
Q4. How can I download the IIT GATE 2027 Information Brochure PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
Q5. What is the last date to apply online for IIT GATE 2027 Information Brochure?
The last date to apply online is 21 September 2026..
Q6. What is the last date to pay the application fee?
Last Date : 21/09/2026
Q7. How can I apply for IIT GATE 2027 Online Form ?
SarkariResult.com (Since 2012) – Official Website of Sarkari Result®
tables: IIT GATE 2027 Exam Apply Online Form | Information Brochure and More

Indian Institute of Technology IIT Madras has released the Information Brochure for Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering GATE 2027. Various Institute are participating in GATE 2027. Those Candidates Are Interested in GATE 2027 Exam Can Apply Online from 14/08/2026 to 21/09/2026. candidates should read the information brochure for all the information related to the Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering Exam like syllabus, eligibility, Question Paper, age limit, Score Card, fees, GATE 2027 information and other types of information and then apply.

Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering (GATE 2027) Conducted By : Indian Institute of Technology IIT Madras IIT GATE 2027 Online Form : Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® Official : WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 14/08/2026 Last Date for Apply Online Phase I : 21/09/2026 Last Date for Apply Online Phase II (Extended Period) : 30/09/2026 GATE 2027 Recertificate Date : 14-21 October 2026 Exam Date : 06-21 February 2027 Exam City Available : 04/01/2027 Admit Card Available : Before Exam Answer Key Available : Notified Soon Result Declared : 19/03/2027

Application Fee General / OBC / EWS : 2000/- SC / ST / PH : 1000/- All Category Female : 1000/- Phase II with Late Fees: General / OBC / EWS : 2500/- SC / ST / PH : 1500/- All Category Female : 1500/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Online Fee Mode Only.
IIT GATE Online Form 2027: Age Limit Details Minimum Age : No Limit Maximum Age : No Limit There is NO age limit to appear for GATE 2027.

Passed / Appearing Pharma D (10+2) / MBBS / B.Sc / BA / B.Com / B.E / B.Tech / B.Pharm / B.Arch / B.Sc. Research / B.S. M.Sc. / MA / MCA / M.E. / M.Tech / Dual Degree / Integrated Courses For Complete Eligibility Details

Sarkari Result® : How to Fill GATE 2027 Online Form Indian Institute of Technology IIT Madras Are Issued Notification and Invited Online Application Form for the GATE 2027 Candidate Can Apply Online for 14/08/2026 to 21/09/2026 (without Late Fee). Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the IIT GATE 2027 Application Form in Sarkari Result Admission Section. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Hand Writing, Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID, Thumb, Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form. For the latest updates on Sarkari Result, admit card, answer key, and result, always visit SarkariResult.com, the official website for Sarkari Result in India (Since 2012).
